name: portfolio-page
description: Portfolio management platform with admin portal and public page

scripts.build: npm run build:shared && npm run build:server && npm run build:client
scripts.lint: cd server && npm run lint && cd ../client && npm run lint
scripts.typecheck: cd shared && npm run typecheck && cd ../server && npm run typecheck && cd ../client && npm run typecheck
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd shared && npm install && cd ../server && npm install && cd ../client && npm install
